Localization.Description: Attempt to change, delete, or add a license key of a Dr.Web object or product

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Administrator {subject.account.name} failed to change the license key of a Dr.Web object
Administrator {subject.account.name} failed to add a Dr.Web product license key
Administrator {subject.account.name} changed the license key of a Dr.Web object
Administrator {subject.account.name} failed to delete a Dr.Web product license key
Administrator {subject.account.name} added a Dr.Web product license key
Administrator {subject.account.name} failed to delete the license key of a Dr.Web object
Administrator {subject.account.name} deleted the license key of a Dr.Web object
Administrator {subject.account.name} deleted a Dr.Web product license key
